title: Components
description: A comprehensive library of reusable, accessible UI components for government websites.
name: Components

title: Accordion
description: An accordion is a collapsible content area that allows users to show or hide sections of related content.
name: Accordion

title: Alert
description: Alerts display concise messages for user attention. They should be used sparingly to communicate the status of an action or system.
name: Alert

title: Banner
description: The banner identifies an official website of the United States government.
name: Banner

title: Breadcrumb
description: Breadcrumbs help users understand where they are within a website and how to get back to previous pages.
name: Breadcrumb

title: Button
description: Buttons communicate actions that users can take. They are typically placed throughout your UI, in places like dialogs, forms, cards, and toolbars.
name: Button

title: Button Group
description: Button groups place two or more buttons together as a single unit.
name: Button Group

title: Card
description: Cards provide a flexible and extensible content container with multiple variants and options.
name: Card

title: Checkbox
description: Checkboxes allow users to select one or more options from a list.
name: Checkbox

title: Combo Box
description: A combo box is a combination of a text input and a dropdown list that allows users to select from a list of options or type their own value.
name: Combo Box

title: Date Picker
description: A date picker allows users to select a date from a calendar interface.
name: Date Picker

title: Date Range Picker
description: A date range picker allows users to select a range of two dates from a calendar interface.
name: Date Range Picker

title: Dropdown
description: Dropdowns allow users to select one option from a list of options.
name: Dropdown

title: Footer
description: The footer provides federal government website information and links across all pages of a site.
name: Footer

title: Form
description: Forms allow users to enter and submit data. USWDS provides form components and layouts to ensure accessibility and usability.
name: Form

title: Grid
description: The USWDS grid system is a 12-column responsive layout system that provides consistent spacing and alignment.
name: Grid

title: Header
description: The header provides primary website navigation and agency identity.
name: Header

title: Icon
description: USWDS icons provide visual indicators and enhance user interfaces with scalable vector graphics.
name: Icon

title: Identifier
description: The identifier is an agency identifier component that provides agency information across the bottom of all pages.
name: Identifier

title: Input Mask
description: Input masks help users format input values like dates, phone numbers, and social security numbers.
name: Input Mask

title: Input Prefix/Suffix
description: Input prefixes and suffixes provide context to help users understand what type of value they should enter.
name: Input Prefix/Suffix

title: Label
description: Labels describe form fields and help users understand what information to enter.
name: Label

title: Link
description: Links allow users to navigate to other pages or sections within the site.
name: Link

title: List
description: Lists organize related items into a sequential or non-sequential format.
name: List

title: Modal
description: Modals present content in a layer above the page. They are used for important alerts or interactions that require user attention.
name: Modal

title: Navigation
description: USWDS navigation components help users find content and navigate through a website.
name: Navigation

title: Pagination
description: Pagination provides navigation for multi-page content, allowing users to move between pages.
name: Pagination

title: Process
description: The process component provides a visual step-by-step indicator for multi-step workflows.
name: Process

title: Radio
description: Radio buttons allow users to select exactly one option from a group.
name: Radio

title: Range Slider
description: Range sliders allow users to select a value from a range by moving a slider thumb.
name: Range Slider

title: Search
description: The search component provides a search input for finding content across the site.
name: Search

title: Side Navigation
description: Side navigation provides a secondary navigation pattern typically used in documentation or multi-section pages.
name: Side Navigation

title: Slider
description: The slider component allows users to display a carousel of images or content.
name: Slider

title: Step Indicator
description: The step indicator component shows a user's progress through a multi-step process.
name: Step Indicator

title: Summary Box
description: Summary boxes highlight key information with a clear visual hierarchy.
name: Summary Box

title: Table
description: Tables organize and display data in rows and columns.
name: Table

title: Tag
description: Tags are used for items like names, categories, or labels.
name: Tag

title: Text Input
description: Text inputs allow users to enter single-line text, numbers, or passwords.
name: Text Input

title: Tooltip
description: Tooltips provide contextual help or definitions when users hover over or focus on an element.
name: Tooltip

title: Typography
description: USWDS typography provides a consistent hierarchy of text styles for government websites.
name: Typography

title: Validation
description: Form validation communicates errors and successes to help users correct invalid data.
name: Validation

title: Templates
description: Complete, ready-to-use page templates following the U.S. Web Design System (USWDS). Each template demonstrates a common government website pattern with accessible markup and proper USWDS components.
name: Templates

title: Authentication Pages Template
description: This template demonstrates complete authentication flows for government services, including sign in, account creation, password recovery, and two-factor authentication.
name: Authentication

title: Patterns
description: Common design patterns and page templates for government websites.
name: Patterns

title: Contact Form
description: Contact forms allow users to send messages or inquiries to an organization. This pattern demonstrates accessible form validation and proper field grouping.
name: Contact Form

title: Search with Autocomplete
description: Search with autocomplete provides suggestions as users type, helping them find content faster and reducing input errors.
name: Search with Autocomplete

title: Password Reset
description: Password reset patterns guide users through the process of recovering access to their accounts when they've forgotten their password.
name: Password Reset

title: Profile
description: User profile pages display account information, preferences, and activity. This pattern demonstrates a complete profile management interface.
name: Profile

title: Accessibility Report
description: Last scan: {% if accessibility-report.timestamp %}{{ accessibility-report.timestamp | date: "%B %d, %Y at %I:%M %p UTC" }}{% else %}No scan data available{% endif %}
name: Accessibility

title: Quality Reports
description: Comprehensive quality metrics and scan results for the USWDS Sandbox.
name: Reports

title: Lighthouse Report
description: Performance metrics and scores from Google Lighthouse scans.
name: Lighthouse

title: Link Checker Report
description: Results from automated link validation scans.
name: Link Checker

title: Meta Tags Report
description: Validation of HTML meta tags across all pages.
name: Meta Tags

title: Search
description: Search components, templates, and patterns
name: Search

title: Colophon
description: How this site is built and maintained.
name: Colophon
